mapper.select: SELECT ci.id as "id", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.name as "name", ci.description as "description", ci.brand as "brandName", ci.image_url as "imageUrl", ci.price as "price", ci.mrp as "mrp", ci.offer_price as "offerPrice", ci.discount_percent as "discount", ci.in_stock as "inStock", ci.available_qty as "availableQuantity", ci.average_rating as "averageRating", ci.review_count as "reviewCount", ci.category_id as "categoryId", ci.supplier_id as "supplierId", ci.featured as "featured", ci.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", 'INR' as "currency" FROM catalog_items ci WHERE ci.active = true AND ci.category_id = #{categoryId} AND ci.brand = #{brand} AND (ci.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ci.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ci.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) AND ci.id = #{id} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM catalog_items WHERE active = true AND featured = true

SELECT ci.id as "id", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.name as "name", ci.description as "description", ci.brand as "brandName", ci.image_url as "imageUrl", ci.price as "price", ci.mrp as "mrp", ci.offer_price as "offerPrice", ci.discount_percent as "discount", ci.in_stock as "inStock", ci.average_rating as "averageRating", ci.review_count as "reviewCount", ci.category_id as "categoryId", 'INR' as "currency" FROM catalog_items ci WHERE ci.active = true AND ci.featured = true ORDER BY ci.review_count DESC, ci.average_rating DESC ${pagination}

SELECT cc.id as "id", cc.name as "name", cc.slug as "slug", cc.parent_id as "parentId", cc.image_url as "imageUrl", cc.description as "description", cc.level as "level", cc.display_order as "sortOrder", COALESCE(cc.product_count, 0) as "productCount" FROM catalog_categories cc WHERE cc.active = true AND cc.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY COALESCE(cc.display_order, 999), cc.name ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM catalog_items WHERE active = true AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')

SELECT ci.id as "id", ci.name as "text", 'product' as "type", ci.product_id as "productId" FROM catalog_items ci WHERE ci.active = true AND ci.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ORDER BY ci.name ASC ${pagination}

SELECT b.id as "id", b.name as "title", b.image_url as "imageUrl", b.mobile_image_url as "mobileImageUrl", b.link_url as "linkUrl", b.position as "position", b.display_order as "displayOrder" FROM banners b WHERE b.active = true AND (b.active_from IS NULL OR b.active_from <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (b.active_to IS NULL OR b.active_to >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY COALESCE(b.display_order, 999)
SELECT DISTINCT brand as "value", brand as "label", 'brand' as "filterType" FROM catalog_items WHERE active = true AND brand IS NOT NULL ORDER BY brand

SELECT p.id as "id", p.name as "name", p.description as "description", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.slug as "slug", p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "mrp", p.hsn_code as "hsnCode", p.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", p.warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", p.is_returnable as "isReturnable", p.return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", p.meta_title as "metaTitle", p.meta_description as "metaDescription", COALESCE(inv_agg.total_available, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv_agg.total_available, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", COALESCE(rev_agg.avg_rating, 0) as "averageRating", COALESCE(rev_agg.review_count, 0) as "reviewCount" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(available_quantity) as total_available FROM inventory_item WHERE state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') GROUP BY product_id ) inv_agg ON inv_agg.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM product_reviews WHERE state_id = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY product_id ) rev_agg ON rev_agg.product_id = p.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.slug = #{slug}

SELECT pv.id as "variantId", pv.product_id as "productId", pv.sku as "sku", COALESCE(o.selling_price, p.base_price) as "sellingPrice", COALESCE(o.mrp, p.base_price) as "mrp", COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", o.id as "offerId", o.state_id as "offerState" FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN offer o ON o.variant_id = pv.id AND o.state_id = 'LIVE' LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id AND inv.state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') WHERE pv.product_id = #{productId} AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY pv.sku

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.state_id as "stateId", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.item_count as "itemCount", pay.state_id as "paymentStatus", pay.payment_method as "paymentMethod", sh.state_id as "shippingStatus", sh.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", sh.carrier as "carrier", sh.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate" FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id WHERE o.tenant = #{tenant} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.created_time DESC ${pagination}

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.state_id as "stateId", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.item_count as "itemCount", pay.state_id as "paymentStatus", pay.payment_method as "paymentMethod", sh.state_id as "shippingStatus", sh.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", sh.carrier as "carrier", sh.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate" FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id WHERE o.tenant = #{tenant} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.created_time DESC ${pagination}

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.state_id as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.item_count as "itemCount", o.created_time as "createdTime", pay.id as "paymentId", pay.state_id as "paymentStatus", pay.payment_method as "paymentMethod", pay.amount as "paymentAmount", sh.id as "shipmentId", sh.state_id as "shippingStatus", sh.carrier as "carrier", sh.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", sh.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", sh.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", sh.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", sh.current_location as "currentLocation" FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT oi.id as "itemId", oi.product_id as "productId", oi.product_name as "productName", oi.variant_id as "variantId", oi.sku as "sku", oi.quantity as "quantity", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "totalPrice", oi.status as "itemStatus", p.slug as "productSlug", p.brand as "brand", ma_img.cdn_url as "imageUrl" FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_media pm_img ON pm_img.product_id = p.id AND pm_img.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN media_assets ma_img ON ma_img.id = pm_img.asset_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.created_time ASC

SELECT sh.id as "shipmentId", sh.order_id as "orderId", sh.state_id as "shippingStatus", sh.carrier as "carrier", sh.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", sh.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", sh.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", sh.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", sh.current_location as "currentLocation", sh.delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts", ste.event_type as "eventType", ste.event_description as "eventDescription", ste.location as "eventLocation", ste.event_time as "eventTime" FROM shipments sh LEFT JOIN shipping_tracking_events ste ON ste.shipment_id = sh.id WHERE sh.order_id = #{orderId} AND sh.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY ste.event_time DESC

SELECT c.id as "cartId", c.state_id as "cartState", c.subtotal as "subtotal", c.currency as "currency", c.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", ci.id as "itemId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.sku as "sku", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.total_price as "totalPrice", ci.image_url as "imageUrl", p.slug as "productSlug", p.brand as "brand", COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) >= ci.quantity THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock" FROM cart c JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND inv.state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') WHERE c.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND c.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY ci.created_time ASC

SELECT r.id as "reviewId", r.product_id as "productId", r.customer_id as "customerId", r.rating as "rating", r.title as "title", r.comment as "comment", r.is_verified_purchase as "isVerifiedPurchase", r.helpful_count as "helpfulCount", r.created_time as "createdTime", u.first_name as "reviewerName" FROM product_reviews r LEFT JOIN user_profiles u ON r.customer_id = u.id WHERE r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.rating = #{rating} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT DISTINCT brand as "name", COUNT(*) as "productCount" FROM catalog_items WHERE active = true AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY brand
SELECT MIN(price) as "minPrice", MAX(price) as "maxPrice", AVG(price) as "avgPrice" FROM catalog_items WHERE active = true AND price IS NOT NULL
